name: CarouselRoot
description: Carousel/slideshow container with autoplay and full keyboard navigation support.
whenToUse: For image galleries, testimonials, or any paginated slide content.
avoidWhen: For static grids of items - use Grid instead.
accessibilityRequirements: aria-roledescription='carousel' on root. Arrow keys navigate slides (Left/Right for horizontal, Up/Down for vertical). Home/End jump to first/last slide. Slides have aria-roledescription='slide' and labeled 'Slide N of M'. Non-active slides have aria-hidden='true'. Autoplay pauses on hover/focus.

parts.name: CarouselItem
parts.description: Individual slide within a Carousel. Auto-registers with parent and provides accessibility attributes.

parts.name: CarouselPrevious
parts.description: Button to navigate to the previous slide.

parts.name: CarouselNext
parts.description: Button to navigate to the next slide.

examples.title: Basic Carousel
examples.description: Use arrow keys to navigate. The carousel pauses autoplay on hover/focus.
examples.code:
{#each [1, 2, 3, 4, 5] as n}
Slide {n}
 {/each}

Current slide: {currentIndex + 1}

examples.title: With Loop and Autoplay
examples.description: Autoplay pauses on hover and focus for accessibility.
examples.code:
{#each ["Alpha", "Beta", "Gamma"] as label}
{label}
 {/each}

examples.title: Vertical Orientation
Keyboard Navigation
examples.code:
Keyboard Shortcuts (horizontal):

  • ArrowLeft: Previous slide
  • ArrowRight: Next slide
  • Home: First slide
  • End: Last slide

For vertical orientation:

  • ArrowUp: Previous slide
  • ArrowDown: Next slide

Autoplay automatically pauses on hover and keyboard focus.
